terms.description: Authorized natural person — the simplest sole trader structure for independent activities in Romania. Personal liability, no separate legal entity.
Individual enterprise — similar to PFA but with patrimony separation. Still one owner, but the business assets can be separated from personal ones.
Family enterprise — a structure allowing family members to jointly operate a business. Income is split among members according to agreed shares.
Limited liability company — a separate legal entity. The owner's personal assets are protected. Can pay salary and/or dividends to the owner.
Social insurance contribution (pension). Mandatory for individuals earning above certain thresholds. Rate: 25% on the applicable base.

terms.fullName: Contribuția de Asigurări Sociale de Sănătate
terms.description: Health insurance contribution. Mandatory for most earners. Rate: 10% on the applicable base, with minimum and maximum thresholds.
Tax on personal income (impozit pe venit). Flat rate of 10% applied to taxable income after deductions.
Profit tax for companies on the standard regime. Rate: 16% of net profit.
Work insurance contribution paid by the employer. Rate: 2.25% of the employee's gross salary.
Consumption tax on goods and services. Registration is mandatory above a turnover threshold (currently 300,000 RON). Standard rate: 19%.
Total salary before any deductions (CAS, CASS, PIT). The base for calculating employee contributions.
Take-home pay after all employee-side deductions (CAS, CASS, PIT) are subtracted from gross salary.
Distribution of company profit to shareholders. Subject to dividend withholding tax (16%) and potentially CASS.
The gross minimum wage set by the government. Used as a reference for contribution thresholds (e.g., CAS base is 12× or 24×MW).
A simplified tax regime for SRLs with revenue under €100,000/year. Tax is 1% of total revenue (not profit), regardless of expenses.
The EUR/RON exchange rate used for converting between currencies. Tax calculations use RON, but this simulator shows results in EUR.

The official Romanian classification code/category for an authorized business activity. Each structure type has limits on how many CAEN activity classes it can register (e.g., PFA allows up to 5, II allows up to 10, SRL has no limit).
